title: FTS database disk image is malformed for special characters in table
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c1, c2, prefix = 1, tokenize = "porter ascii");
key_bug_features: Special characters in FTS table cause database corruption
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt2 USING fts5(c1 TEXT, c2 TEXT, c3 INTEGER, tokenize = 'porter ascii');
INSERT INTO vt2 VALUES ('normal text', 'text with special char: @#$%', 1);
INSERT INTO vt2 VALUES (NULL, 'text with NULL', 2);
INSERT INTO vt2 VALUES ('boundary value', 'text with boundary: �', 3);
SELECT * FROM vt2 WHERE c2 LIKE '%special char%';
